instructions: Java 17 + Swing + MySQL (MariaDB via XAMPP) + JDBC. NetBeans Ant project (no Maven/Gradle, no module-info).
Build: from PCBuildStore/ run `ant clean; if ($?) { ant build }`
MySQL: XAMPP default — root, no password, MariaDB 10.4.
Java source & target 17. main.class left empty in project.properties by design.
Package structure: database/ (DBConnection), models/ (Build, GPUOption, Bill), dao/ (CRUD), ui/ (Swing GUIs).
Module allocation (vertical slices): Hanan=Dashboard, Haroon=Build Catalog, Aitzaz=GPU Upgrades, Ahmad=Billing.
3 DB tables: builds, gpu_options, bills (seed data from old PF project).
Coding rules: no comments unless asked, no emojis in files, keep output concise.
AGENTS.md at project root has full project context.
